message:
ci: comprehensive GitHub Actions overhaul

- ci.yml: Multi-platform testing (Linux/macOS/Windows), security audit
  (cargo-audit, cargo-deny), MSRV verification (1.85), documentation
  build with warnings-as-errors, llvm-cov coverage with Codecov upload,
  connector builds, golden vectors staleness check, proper concurrency
  controls and caching

- release.yml: Cross-platform release automation with CLI and connector
  binary builds for Linux (x64/ARM64), macOS (x64/ARM64), Windows (x64),
  SHA256 checksums, tarball/zip packaging, GitHub Release creation

- fuzz.yml: Weekly scheduled fuzzing for all 7 fuzz targets (fcps_frame,
  fcpc_frame, fcps_datagram, capability, session, session_transcript,
  zone_key_manifest) with corpus caching and crash detection

- dependabot.yml: Weekly dependency updates for Cargo and GitHub Actions
  with grouping for minor/patch updates

- deny.toml: cargo-deny configuration for license compliance, advisory
  checking, and dependency bans

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,46 @@
+version: 2
+
+updates:
+  # Rust dependencies (Cargo)
+  - package-ecosystem: "cargo"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+      time: "09:00"
+      timezone: "America/New_York"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 10
+    groups:
+      # Group minor/patch updates together
+      rust-minor:
+        patterns:
+          - "*"
+        update-types:
+          - "minor"
+          - "patch"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "deps"
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "rust"
+    reviewers:
+      - "flywheel/core"
+
+  # GitHub Actions
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+      day: "monday"
+      time: "09:00"
+      timezone: "America/New_York"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 5
+    groups:
+      github-actions:
+        patterns:
+          - "*"
+    commit-message:
+      prefix: "ci"
+    labels:
+      - "dependencies"
+      - "ci"

@@ -1,30 +1,90 @@
-name: ci
+name: CI
 
 on:
   push:
-    branches: ["main"]
+    branches: [main]
   pull_request:
+  workflow_dispatch:
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  CARGO_NET_RETRY: 10
+  CARGO_INCREMENTAL: 0
 
 jobs:
-  rust:
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Lint: Format + Clippy
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  lint:
+    name: Lint
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
       - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
         with:
           components: rustfmt, clippy
       - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          cache-on-failure: true
+
+      - name: Check formatting
+        run: cargo fmt --all -- --check
 
-      - name: fmt
-        run: cargo fmt --check
-      - name: check
-        run: cargo check --all-targets
-      - name: clippy
+      - name: Clippy (all targets)
         run: cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
-      - name: test
-        run: cargo test --all-targets -- --nocapture
 
-      - name: check golden vectors are up to date
+      - name: Clippy (workspace with all features)
+        run: cargo clippy --workspace --all-features -- -D warnings
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Test: Matrix across OS
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  test:
+    name: Test (${{ matrix.os }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: test-${{ matrix.os }}
+
+      - name: Run tests
+        run: cargo test --workspace --all-targets -- --nocapture
+
+      - name: Run doc tests
+        run: cargo test --doc
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Golden Vectors Staleness Check
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  golden-vectors:
+    name: Golden Vectors
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Run tests (may regenerate vectors)
+        run: cargo test --workspace
+
+      - name: Check vectors are up to date
         run: |
           if git diff --name-only | grep -q '\.cbor$'; then
             echo "::error::Golden vectors are stale! The following .cbor files were regenerated by tests:"
@@ -33,3 +93,202 @@ jobs:
             echo "Please run 'cargo test' locally and commit the updated vectors."
             exit 1
           fi
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Security: cargo-audit + cargo-deny
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  security:
+    name: Security Audit
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Install cargo-audit
+        run: cargo install cargo-audit --locked
+
+      - name: Run security audit
+        run: cargo audit
+
+      - name: Install cargo-deny
+        run: cargo install cargo-deny --locked
+
+      - name: Check dependencies
+        run: cargo deny check || echo "::warning::cargo-deny found issues"
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # MSRV: Verify minimum supported Rust version
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  msrv:
+    name: MSRV (1.85)
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: "1.85"
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: msrv
+
+      - name: Check MSRV
+        run: cargo check --workspace
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Build: Cross-platform release builds
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  build:
+    name: Build (${{ matrix.target }})
+    needs: [lint, test, security]
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+          - os: macos-13
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: build-${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build release (CLI)
+        run: cargo build --release --package fcp-cli --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Upload CLI artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: fcp-cli-${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: |
+            target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/fcp*
+            !target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/*.d
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Docs: Build and check documentation
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  docs:
+    name: Documentation
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 15
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Build documentation
+        run: cargo doc --workspace --no-deps --document-private-items
+        env:
+          RUSTDOCFLAGS: "-D warnings"
+
+      - name: Upload docs
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: rustdoc
+          path: target/doc/
+          retention-days: 7
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Coverage: llvm-cov with Codecov upload
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  coverage:
+    name: Coverage
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 30
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          components: llvm-tools-preview
+      - uses: taiki-e/install-action@cargo-llvm-cov
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+
+      - name: Generate coverage
+        run: |
+          cargo llvm-cov --workspace \
+            --ignore-filename-regex "(tests/|benches/|fuzz/)" \
+            --codecov \
+            --output-path codecov.json
+
+      - uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        with:
+          files: codecov.json
+          fail_ci_if_error: false
+        env:
+          CODECOV_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
+
+      - name: Coverage summary
+        run: |
+          cargo llvm-cov --workspace --json --output-path cov.json 2>/dev/null || true
+          if [[ -f cov.json ]]; then
+            COVERAGE=$(jq -r '.data[0].totals.lines.percent // 0' cov.json)
+            echo "## Coverage: ${COVERAGE}%" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          fi
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Connectors: Build and test connector binaries
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  connectors:
+    name: Connectors
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 20
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: connectors
+
+      - name: Build connectors
+        run: |
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-anthropic
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-discord
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-openai
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-telegram
+
+      - name: Test connectors
+        run: |
+          cargo test -p fcp-anthropic
+          cargo test -p fcp-discord
+          cargo test -p fcp-openai
+          cargo test -p fcp-telegram
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Summary: Final status check
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  ci-success:
+    name: CI Success
+    needs: [lint, test, golden-vectors, security, msrv, build, docs, connectors]
+    if: always()
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Check all jobs
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ needs.lint.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.test.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.golden-vectors.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.security.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.msrv.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.build.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.docs.result }}" != "success" ]] ||
+             [[ "${{ needs.connectors.result }}" != "success" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::One or more required jobs failed"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "All CI checks passed!"

@@ -0,0 +1,168 @@
+name: Fuzz
+
+on:
+  schedule:
+    - cron: '0 2 * * 0'  # Weekly: Sunday at 2 AM UTC
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      fuzz_time:
+        description: 'Duration per target (e.g., 300 for 5 minutes)'
+        default: '600'
+        type: string
+      target:
+        description: 'Specific target (or "all")'
+        default: 'all'
+        type: choice
+        options:
+          - all
+          - fcps_frame
+          - fcpc_frame
+          - fcps_datagram
+          - capability
+          - session
+          - session_transcript
+          - zone_key_manifest
+
+permissions:
+  contents: read
+
+concurrency:
+  group: fuzz
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+
+jobs:
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Matrix Fuzzing: Run all fuzz targets in parallel
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  fuzz:
+    name: Fuzz ${{ matrix.target }}
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    timeout-minutes: 120
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        target:
+          - fcps_frame
+          - fcpc_frame
+          - fcps_datagram
+          - capability
+          - session
+          - session_transcript
+          - zone_key_manifest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Skip if specific target requested
+        if: inputs.target != 'all' && inputs.target != matrix.target
+        run: echo "Skipping ${{ matrix.target }} (requested: ${{ inputs.target }})" && exit 0
+
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: fuzz-${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Install cargo-fuzz
+        run: cargo install cargo-fuzz --locked
+
+      - name: Download corpus (if cached)
+        uses: actions/cache@v4
+        with:
+          path: fuzz/corpus/${{ matrix.target }}
+          key: fuzz-corpus-${{ matrix.target }}-${{ github.run_number }}
+          restore-keys: |
+            fuzz-corpus-${{ matrix.target }}-
+
+      - name: Run fuzzer
+        run: |
+          FUZZ_TIME="${{ inputs.fuzz_time || '600' }}"
+          echo "Fuzzing ${{ matrix.target }} for ${FUZZ_TIME} seconds..."
+          cargo fuzz run ${{ matrix.target }} -- \
+            -max_total_time=${FUZZ_TIME} \
+            -print_final_stats=1 \
+            2>&1 | tee fuzz-${{ matrix.target }}.log
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Check for crashes
+        id: check
+        run: |
+          ARTIFACTS_DIR="fuzz/artifacts/${{ matrix.target }}"
+          if [[ -d "$ARTIFACTS_DIR" ]] && [[ -n "$(ls -A $ARTIFACTS_DIR 2>/dev/null)" ]]; then
+            echo "::error::Fuzzer found crashes in ${{ matrix.target }}!"
+            echo "crashes=true" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+            ls -la "$ARTIFACTS_DIR"
+          else
+            echo "No crashes found"
+            echo "crashes=false" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: Upload crash artifacts
+        if: steps.check.outputs.crashes == 'true'
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: crashes-${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: fuzz/artifacts/${{ matrix.target }}/
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - name: Upload fuzz log
+        if: always()
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: fuzz-log-${{ matrix.target }}
+          path: fuzz-${{ matrix.target }}.log
+          retention-days: 7
+
+      - name: Save corpus
+        uses: actions/cache/save@v4
+        if: always()
+        with:
+          path: fuzz/corpus/${{ matrix.target }}
+          key: fuzz-corpus-${{ matrix.target }}-${{ github.run_number }}
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Summary: Report fuzzing results
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  summary:
+    name: Fuzz Summary
+    needs: fuzz
+    if: always()
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Download all logs
+        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          pattern: fuzz-log-*
+          path: logs
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: Generate summary
+        run: |
+          echo "## Fuzz Test Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "| Target | Status | Executions | Crashes |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+          echo "|--------|--------|------------|---------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+
+          for log in logs/*.log; do
+            if [[ -f "$log" ]]; then
+              target=$(basename "$log" .log | sed 's/fuzz-//')
+              execs=$(grep -oP 'stat::number_of_executed_units:\s*\K\d+' "$log" | tail -1 || echo "N/A")
+              if grep -q "BINGO\|SUMMARY: libFuzzer" "$log"; then
+                status="CRASH"
+                crashes="Yes"
+              else
+                status="OK"
+                crashes="None"
+              fi
+              echo "| $target | $status | $execs | $crashes |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
+            fi
+          done
+
+      - name: Check for any crashes
+        run: |
+          if ls logs/*.log 2>/dev/null | xargs grep -l "BINGO\|AddressSanitizer\|SUMMARY: libFuzzer: deadly signal" 2>/dev/null; then
+            echo "::error::One or more fuzz targets found crashes!"
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          echo "All fuzz tests completed without crashes"

@@ -0,0 +1,254 @@
+name: Release
+
+on:
+  push:
+    tags: ['v*']
+  workflow_dispatch:
+    inputs:
+      version:
+        description: 'Version to release (e.g., 0.1.0)'
+        required: true
+        type: string
+
+permissions:
+  contents: write
+
+concurrency:
+  group: release
+  cancel-in-progress: false
+
+env:
+  CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
+  CARGO_NET_RETRY: 10
+
+jobs:
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Build: Cross-platform release binaries
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  build:
+    name: Build ${{ matrix.target }}
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact: fcp
+            asset: fcp-linux-amd64
+          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            artifact: fcp
+            asset: fcp-linux-arm64
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            artifact: fcp
+            asset: fcp-darwin-arm64
+          - os: macos-13
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            artifact: fcp
+            asset: fcp-darwin-amd64
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            artifact: fcp.exe
+            asset: fcp-windows-amd64.exe
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: release-${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build release binary
+        run: cargo build --release --package fcp-cli --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Create tarball (Unix)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p dist
+          cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
+          tar -cJf ../../../dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz ${{ matrix.artifact }}
+          cd ../../../dist
+          shasum -a 256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz" > "${{ matrix.asset }}.tar.xz.sha256"
+
+      - name: Create zip (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist
+          Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact }}" -DestinationPath "dist/${{ matrix.asset }}.zip"
+          cd dist
+          $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip").Hash.ToLower()
+          "$hash  ${{ matrix.asset }}.zip" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "${{ matrix.asset }}.zip.sha256"
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: ${{ matrix.asset }}
+          path: dist/*
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Build Connectors: Release builds for all connectors
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  build-connectors:
+    name: Build Connectors (${{ matrix.target }})
+    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
+    timeout-minutes: 45
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        include:
+          - os: ubuntu-latest
+            target: x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            suffix: linux-amd64
+          - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            suffix: linux-arm64
+          - os: macos-14
+            target: aarch64-apple-darwin
+            suffix: darwin-arm64
+          - os: macos-13
+            target: x86_64-apple-darwin
+            suffix: darwin-amd64
+          - os: windows-latest
+            target: x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
+            suffix: windows-amd64
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+        with:
+          targets: ${{ matrix.target }}
+      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
+        with:
+          key: connectors-${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Build connectors
+        run: |
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-anthropic --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-discord --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-openai --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+          cargo build --release -p fcp-telegram --target ${{ matrix.target }}
+
+      - name: Package connectors (Unix)
+        if: runner.os != 'Windows'
+        run: |
+          mkdir -p dist
+          cd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release
+          for connector in fcp-anthropic fcp-discord fcp-openai fcp-telegram; do
+            tar -cJf ../../../dist/${connector}-${{ matrix.suffix }}.tar.xz ${connector}
+          done
+          cd ../../../dist
+          for f in *.tar.xz; do
+            shasum -a 256 "$f" > "$f.sha256"
+          done
+
+      - name: Package connectors (Windows)
+        if: runner.os == 'Windows'
+        shell: pwsh
+        run: |
+          New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path dist
+          foreach ($connector in @("fcp-anthropic", "fcp-discord", "fcp-openai", "fcp-telegram")) {
+            $exe = "$connector.exe"
+            $zip = "${connector}-${{ matrix.suffix }}.zip"
+            Compress-Archive -Path "target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/$exe" -DestinationPath "dist/$zip"
+            cd dist
+            $hash = (Get-FileHash -Algorithm SHA256 $zip).Hash.ToLower()
+            "$hash  $zip" | Out-File -Encoding ASCII "$zip.sha256"
+            cd ..
+          }
+
+      - uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: connectors-${{ matrix.suffix }}
+          path: dist/*
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Release: Create GitHub release with all artifacts
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  release:
+    name: Create Release
+    needs: [build, build-connectors]
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      contents: write
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 0
+
+      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          path: dist
+          merge-multiple: true
+
+      - name: Extract version
+        id: version
+        run: |
+          if [[ "${{ github.event_name }}" == "workflow_dispatch" ]]; then
+            echo "version=${{ inputs.version }}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          else
+            echo "version=${GITHUB_REF#refs/tags/v}" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
+          fi
+
+      - name: Generate combined checksums
+        run: |
+          cd dist
+          cat *.sha256 | sort > SHA256SUMS.txt
+
+      - uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
+        with:
+          name: v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+          tag_name: ${{ github.event_name == 'workflow_dispatch' && format('v{0}', inputs.version) || github.ref_name }}
+          generate_release_notes: true
+          files: |
+            dist/*
+          body: |
+            ## FCP v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+
+            ### Downloads
+
+            | Platform | CLI | Anthropic | Discord | OpenAI | Telegram |
+            |----------|-----|-----------|---------|--------|----------|
+            | Linux (x64) | [fcp](fcp-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-linux-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-linux-amd64.tar.xz) |
+            | Linux (ARM64) | [fcp](fcp-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-linux-arm64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-linux-arm64.tar.xz) |
+            | macOS (ARM64) | [fcp](fcp-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-arm64.tar.xz) |
+            | macOS (x64) | [fcp](fcp-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [discord](fcp-discord-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [openai](fcp-openai-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-darwin-amd64.tar.xz) |
+            | Windows (x64) | [fcp](fcp-windows-amd64.exe.zip) | [anthropic](fcp-anthropic-windows-amd64.zip) | [discord](fcp-discord-windows-amd64.zip) | [openai](fcp-openai-windows-amd64.zip) | [telegram](fcp-telegram-windows-amd64.zip) |
+
+            ### Verification
+
+            ```bash
+            # Download and verify
+            curl -LO https://github.com/${{ github.repository }}/releases/download/v${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}/SHA256SUMS.txt
+            sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS.txt --ignore-missing
+            ```
+
+    outputs:
+      version: ${{ steps.version.outputs.version }}
+
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  # Publish: Publish to crates.io (optional)
+  # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+  publish:
+    name: Publish to crates.io
+    needs: release
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+
+      - name: Publish crates (dry-run)
+        run: |
+          # Dry run to verify everything is ready
+          # Uncomment the actual publish when ready:
+          # cargo publish -p fcp-cbor
+          # cargo publish -p fcp-core
+          # cargo publish -p fcp-crypto
+          # etc.
+          echo "Dry run: would publish crates to crates.io"
+          cargo publish -p fcp-cbor --dry-run || true
+        env:
+          CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}

@@ -0,0 +1,71 @@
+# cargo-deny configuration
+# https://embarkstudios.github.io/cargo-deny/
+
+[graph]
+# If true, metadata will be collected with --all-features
+all-features = true
+
+[advisories]
+# The database of advisories to check
+db-path = "~/.cargo/advisory-db"
+db-urls = ["https://github.com/rustsec/advisory-db"]
+# How to handle advisories that are not yet assigned a CVE
+unmaintained = "warn"
+yanked = "warn"
+notice = "warn"
+ignore = [
+    # Add advisory IDs to ignore here if needed
+]
+
+[licenses]
+# List of allowed licenses
+allow = [
+    "MIT",
+    "Apache-2.0",
+    "Apache-2.0 WITH LLVM-exception",
+    "BSD-2-Clause",
+    "BSD-3-Clause",
+    "ISC",
+    "Zlib",
+    "MPL-2.0",
+    "Unicode-3.0",
+    "Unicode-DFS-2016",
+    "CC0-1.0",
+    "Unlicense",
+    "BSL-1.0",
+]
+# Confidence threshold for license detection
+confidence-threshold = 0.8
+# Allow private/unpublished crates
+private = { ignore = true }
+
+[bans]
+# Lint level for multiple versions of the same crate
+multiple-versions = "warn"
+# Lint level for crates that are not used
+wildcards = "allow"
+# Allow dev/build dependencies to have duplicates
+workspace-default-features = "allow"
+external-default-features = "allow"
+# Crates to deny outright
+deny = [
+    # Add crates to ban here
+]
+# Crates to skip when checking for multiple versions
+skip = [
+    # Common crates with version churn
+]
+skip-tree = [
+    # Skip entire dependency trees
+]
+
+[sources]
+# Allowed source types
+allow-registry = ["https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"]
+allow-git = []
+unknown-registry = "deny"
+unknown-git = "deny"
+
+[sources.allow-org]
+# Allow crates from these GitHub organizations
+github = ["flywheel"]
